title: true
subtitle: The true singleton — Io's representation of boolean truth.

members.name: and
members.description: Evaluates the argument and returns the result.

members.name: else
members.description: Does not eval argument and returns true.

members.name: elseif
members.description: Does not eval argument and returns true.

members.name: ifFalse
members.description: Does not eval argument and returns true.

members.name: ifTrue
members.description: Evaluates the argument and returns self.

members.name: justSerialized
members.description: Writes the receiver's code into the stream.

members.name: not
members.description: Does not eval argument and returns false.

members.name: or
members.description: Does not eval argument and returns true.

members.name: then
members.description: Evaluates the argument and returns nil.
